turns.user_message: I used to breeze through my daily tasks without a second thought, but lately everything feels like a massive uphill battle. It only started a couple of weeks ago, yet I already feel completely drained by the time I sit down to begin. I keep staring at the same simple items on my list, wondering why they suddenly seem so heavy. I just want to get back to that effortless rhythm I had before this recent slump hit me. Honestly, it is so frustrating to watch my own momentum just evaporate out of nowhere.

That sudden shift I mentioned has completely taken over my routine now, turning what used to be a smooth flow into a constant grind. Every single morning feels heavier than the last, and I keep catching myself wondering when this recent fog will finally lift. I try to push through like I always did, but my mind just keeps hitting a wall instead of finding its usual groove. It is exhausting to feel so disconnected from the energy I used to rely on every single day. I just keep hoping this weird phase passes before it completely drains whatever spark I have left.

I honestly cannot believe how fast this recent slump has completely hijacked my entire mindset, leaving me miles away from the driven person I used to be. What started as a minor dip a few weeks back has now turned into a relentless weight that I drag around constantly. I sit down ready to tackle things, but my brain just refuses to engage like it naturally did before. It is incredibly frustrating to watch my own focus shatter into pieces when I know exactly how capable I used to be. I just want this sudden exhaustion to stop so I can finally feel like myself again.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This just started recently.
